full_text:
The received tissue was in multiple pieces, consisting of one small part of stiffer tissue and some softer tissue that still could be tumor tissue. Removed parts that had been burned or bloody. When miching, the tissue was falling apart easily. Not a typical tissue, most probably not HGSC.

The sample was minced into small pieces and dissociated using Dispase.

Dispase dissociation media included 9.7 mL DMEM/F12+++ (DMEM/F12 supplemented with 1X glutamax, 10 mM HEPES, and 1% pen/strep) + 200 µL Dispase + 100 µL DNAse. Incubated at 37°C rotating for 30 min, vortexed before and after. Filtered through a 70 µm cell strainer.

Dispase dissociated cells:

RBC lysis with 5 ml for 5 min + 20 ml DMEM/F12+++. The final pellet was resuspended in 4 mL of DMEM/F12+++ media. A 1:10 dilution was done before counting.

Cell counts:

Biobanking

Dispase dissociated cells: 3x 10.00 E6 cells

Cells were frozen in 1mL of STEM-CellBanker.

| | Dispase
1) | total [E6 cells/ml] | 11,9
 | live [E6 cells/ml] | 3.95
 | viability [%] | 33.3
 | size [µm] | 8.2
2) | total [E6 cells/ml] | 10.8
 | live [E6 cells/ml] | 3.62
 | viability [%] | 33.7
 | size [µm] | 7.9
Average | [cells/ml] | 11.35 E6
 | total [cells] | 454 E6 in 4 mL
 | viability [%] | 33.5
